articles.title: Apple agrees to $250M settlement over iPhone AI marketing claims
articles.description: Apple agreed to a $250M settlement over claims it misled buyers about AI-powered Siri features on certain iPhones. Eligible users could receive up to $95.
articles.content:
Apple has agreed to a $250 million settlement to resolve claims it misled consumers about artificial intelligence features tied to its latest iPhones, according to a federal court filing.
